title: Penguh's Head⇄Swap
description: Put any item on your head!
body: - To put an item on your head, type `/trigger headswap` while holding the item of your choice. - If there's already an item on your head, it will swap with what you're holding. - If the item on your head has Curse of Binding, it will not be swapped. Uninstall with `/function headswap:uninstall`, or `/scoreboard objectives remove headswap`.
